groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Minimum inputs for a useful, accurate FAQ draft.

groups.title: FAQ project
groups.description: Page type, purpose, length, tone, and ownership.

groups.title: Website / product
groups.description: What the FAQ is about — stage, platforms, support links.

groups.title: Audience
groups.description: Who asks these questions and what confuses them.

groups.title: Question sources
groups.description: Where real questions come from — avoid inventing “frequent” asks.

groups.title: Approved facts
groups.description: Only verified product, policy, and support facts.

groups.title: High-stakes content
groups.description: Medical, legal, financial, and other regulated FAQ topics.

groups.title: FAQ search
groups.description: Search, synonyms, zero-result handling, and privacy.

groups.title: Accordion & format
groups.description: How the FAQ is presented and navigated.

groups.title: Page introduction
groups.description: Support destination used in the intro.

groups.title: SEO
groups.description: Keywords, titles, slug, and cannibalization notes.

groups.title: Structured data
groups.description: FAQ schema only when visible content matches.

groups.title: Content duplication
groups.description: Canonical page and migration notes.

groups.title: Content governance
groups.description: Owners, review cadence, and update process.

groups.title: Freshness
groups.description: Review intervals and change triggers.

groups.title: Corrections
groups.description: How incorrect FAQ answers are fixed.

groups.title: Localization
groups.description: Locale-specific FAQ variables.

groups.title: Pluralization & dynamic values
groups.description: Count-sensitive and dynamic answer fields.

groups.title: Print & export
groups.description: Print and PDF support.

groups.title: Visual content
groups.description: Screenshots, captions, alt text, rights.

groups.title: Chatbot connection
groups.description: When the FAQ feeds a chatbot.

groups.title: Analytics
groups.description: Success and guardrail metrics.

groups.title: User feedback
groups.description: Was this helpful and follow-up process.

groups.title: Marketing restrictions
groups.description: Claims the FAQ must never make.

variables.label: Product Name
variables.hint: Product or site the FAQ is about.

help.what: Website or product name.
help.why: Answers must match the real product name and scope.
help.avoid: Vague “our platform” without naming the product.

variables.label: Product Type
variables.hint: What kind of product this is.

help.what: Product Type — a parameter from the FAQ Page brief (Website / product).
help.why: When provided, the model uses this instead of inventing product behavior, policies, or “frequent” questions. Empty fields stay unset ([productType]).
help.avoid: Invented prices, guarantees, response times, or promotional fake FAQs for product type.
